events.name: Carbon Valley Gymnastics Meet
events.host: Carbon Valley Parks and Recreation District
events.notes: Spectator seating is on the upper level (running track). Limited chairs are provided — you may bring your own, for use on the upper level only.

memories.title: Carbon Valley Gymnastics Meet — Optionals
memories.text: First meet recorded in the archive. Tyndle competed in Optionals at the Carbon Valley Gymnastics Meet in Frederick. Replace this with how the day actually went — warm-up nerves, the routine you'll remember, the drive home.
